hooks.command: file_path="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(rs)$'; then cargo fmt --all 2>/dev/null; fi

file_path="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '(pnpm-lock\.yaml|package-lock\.json|yarn\.lock|Cargo\.lock|\.env)'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit lock files or .env files directly. Use CLI tools (pnpm add, cargo add) for dependencies.' >&2; exit 2; fi
